evidence.code: src/App.tsx:92 startCamera handles missing getUserMedia, permission denial, no camera, success stream attach, and stop cleanup
evidence.readme: README.md:65 manual QA requires allow/deny browser permission checks

satisfied.criterion: Audio alarm requires explicit enablement and respects mute.

evidence.code: src/App.tsx:145 enableAudioAlarm requires explicit Web Audio opt-in; muteAudioAlarm stops tone and sets muted; playAlarmTone only runs when audio is ready and mode is not silent
evidence.readme: README.md:58 manual QA still needs audible confirmation for enable/mute behavior
evidence.remaining_manual_qa: audible alarm and no-audio mute confirmation require real browser/audio
